meaning: adj.加香料的,出产香料的,辛辣的,有风味的
examples: Thai food is hot and spicy.
The spicy flavours in these dishes call for reds rather than whites.
Start with the spicy fried soft shell crab and juicy morsels of grilled beef wrapped in betel leaves.
She says when we eat spicy foods, something called our trigeminal nerve is actually irritated.
